main.description: An attachment providing commentary, context, or documentary material related to a hypercert record (e.g. an activity, project, claim, or evaluation). Attachments may support, clarify, or challenge the referenced subject.

subjects.description: References to the subject(s) the attachment is connected to—this may be an activity claim, outcome claim, measurement, evaluation, or even another attachment. This is optional as the attachment can exist before the claim is recorded.

author.description: The DID(s) of the entity or entities that produced the attachment.

attachments.description: The files, documents, or external references included in this attachment record.

title.description: Human-readable title to describe the nature of the attachment.

comment.description: Optional short commentary about the attached material.

shortDescription.description: Short description explaining what this attachment shows or documents.

description.description: Longer description describing the attachment in more detail, including context or interpretation.

locations.description: Optional geographic references that this attachment relates to. Each referenced record must conform with the app.certified.location lexicon.

relationType.description: How this attachment relates to the subject.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created
